species.distribution: Borneo, Java, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. MINDANAO: Surigao del Sur, Zamboanga del Norte, NEGROS (photos).

species.citation: Siebold & Zucc. , Fl. Jap. (Siebold) 1 (1837) 53 ; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1949) 52. = Styrax japonicus var. kotoensis (Hayata) Masam. & Suzuki , Rep. (Annual) Taihoku Bot. Gard. 3 (1933) 65 ; Li, Fl. Taiwan ed. 2, 4 (1998) 99; ≡ Styrax kotoensis Hayata , Icon. Pl. Formosan. 5 (1915) 121. = Styrax philippinensis Merr. & Quisumb. , PJS 56 (1935) 313; Type: BS 79248 Edaño (L, NY, iso), Camiguin de Babuyanes: Mt Malabsing, 9-Mar-1930; BS 80424 Ramos (NY), Batan: Mt Matarem, forest slopes, 500ft, 20-Jun-1930.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, BATANES, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES, LUZON.
